name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F (232°C). Prepare pie crust according to package directions for an unfilled one-crust pie using a 9-inch pie pan.
2. Refrigerate remaining crust for later use.
3. Gently press 1 cup peanuts into the bottom and up the sides of the crust.
4. Prick the crust with a fork.
5. Bake at 450°F (232°C) for 10-14 minutes or until lightly golden brown. Cool.
6. Sprinkle with 1/2 cup miniature chocolate chips.
7. In a medium bowl, beat whipping cream, 1/4 cup confectioner's sugar, and vanilla until soft peaks form. Set aside.
8. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese and peanut butter until light and fluffy.
9. Add 1 cup confectioner's sugar and milk, beating until smooth and creamy.
10. Fold in 1-1/2 cups of the whipped cream.
11. Spoon into cooled pie crust and spread evenly.
12. Refrigerate at least 4 hours before serving. Garnish with remaining whipped cream and sprinkle with topping.
13. Store in refrigerator. Serves 8-10.
